errors.name: Name must be at least 3 characters
errors.phone: Phone must be at least 8 digits

fineline.title: Absolute Precision
fineline.body: Pure minimalism and elegance in every stroke. Ideal for discreet pieces with deep meaning.

realismo.title: Hyper-realism
realismo.body: Portraits and pieces that breathe life. We take your references to the highest level of detail and contrast.

geometrico.title: Mathematical Harmony
geometrico.body: Complex patterns and mandalas perfectly designed to flow organically with your anatomy.

custom.title: Signature Design
custom.body: Unique artworks created 100% bespoke. We merge your most demanding ideas with our aesthetic vision.

coverups.title: Total Renewal
coverups.body: Give your skin a new life. We flawlessly transform and conceal old pieces into true masterpieces.

0.title: Surgical Precision
0.desc: We avoid the dreaded 'blowout'. True fine line requires masterful command of the needle and human anatomy.

1.title: Pure Contrast
1.desc: Absolute blacks that blend masterfully into negative spaces, creating native dimension on the skin.

2.title: Immortality
2.desc: Anatomically scaled designs to heal perfectly and age gracefully along with your body.

portfolio.desc: Our pieces are visual narratives etched into the skin. Explore our archive of masterpieces.

needleMagic.desc: We spent years perfecting every pulse. Our avant-garde equipment ensures every stroke heals with unwavering consistency, exceeding clinical standards.

piercings.desc: High-end body jewelry. Every piercing is executed with clinical precision and implant-grade materials, because your body deserves the same as a piece of fine jewelry.

ear-curation.title: Ear Curation
ear-curation.subtitle: Curated Constellation
ear-curation.desc: Custom design of multiple ear piercings. A fine jewelry composition that transforms the ear into an art gallery.

septum.title: Septum
septum.subtitle: Central Elegance
septum.desc: Septum piercing with high-end artisanal rings. Minimalism that defines character with surgical precision.

nostril.title: Nostril
nostril.subtitle: Subtle Diamond
nostril.desc: Nasal stud with precious stone or delicate ring. A luminous accent, almost imperceptible, that elevates any profile.

labret.title: Labret
labret.subtitle: Lip Precision
labret.desc: Lip piercing with implant-grade titanium stud. Minimally invasive technique for optimal healing and flawless look.

eyebrow.title: Eyebrow
eyebrow.subtitle: Defined Arch
eyebrow.desc: Curved eyebrow barbell with premium finishes. A subtle statement that frames the gaze with attitude and sophistication.

navel.title: Navel
navel.subtitle: Body Jewel
navel.desc: Navel piercing with exclusive dangling jewelry. Artisanal pieces that combine movement and elegance.

piercings.bottom1: Can't find what you're looking for? We perform piercings on
piercings.bottom3: of the body with implant-grade titanium, gold, and niobium jewelry.

artists.desc: The team behind the magic. Certified artists who combine impeccable technique with limitless artistic vision.

ceo.bio: Master of realism with obsessive attention to detail. Founder of Mr Studio Tattoo, he leads the studio with an unwavering vision of perfection and exclusivity.

ramses.bio: Specialist in realism and shadows. Transforms photographs and complex concepts into immortal artworks on the skin.

misael.bio: Master of color and solid lines. His neo-traditional style stands out for its vibrant palette and impeccable composition.

tony.bio: Limitless creative vision. Transforms abstract ideas into permanent art with mathematical precision.

khris.bio: Delicacy and pinpoint precision. Specialist in ultra-fine strokes and minimalist designs that heal perfectly.

alejandro.bio: Creator of ornamental and blackwork pieces with high contrast and unique patterns that adapt to the anatomy.

alinette.bio: Specialist in floral tattoos and watercolor techniques. Her designs stand out for their fluidity and ethereal tones.

testimonials.desc: What our clients say. Every review is a testament to our obsession with excellence.

0.quote: Reinier is an amazing artist. My tattoo exceeded all expectations. Precision, cleanliness, absolute professionalism.
0.author: Raidel B.

1.quote: Loved this place. The team is very attentive and the result is beautiful. Total recommendation for anyone seeking quality.
1.author: Stephanie M.

2.quote: The best studio in Miami. World-class artists with fair prices. I already scheduled my next session.
2.author: Carlos R.

3.quote: Traveled from New York specifically to get tattooed here. The attention to detail is unmatched. Every line is perfect.
3.author: Andrea L.

4.quote: They transformed an old tattoo I hated into a work of art. The cover-up turned out incredible, you can't even tell there was anything before.
4.author: Miguel F.

footer.consentTitle: Complete your consent before the appointment
footer.consentDesc: Mandatory digital form. For minors, the presence of a legal guardian is required.
footer.bookDesc: Artists specializing in realism, fine line, and custom design. Walk-ins welcome subject to availability.

consent.desc: Complete your consent form digitally. Fast, secure, and paperless.
consent.s1Desc: Basic information for your consent contract.
consent.minorBanner: As a minor under 18, legal guardian information is required to proceed.
consent.s2Desc: Required information to ensure your safety during the procedure.
consent.q1: Do you have any medical conditions?
consent.q2: Are you currently taking any medications?
consent.q4: Have you consumed alcohol or drugs in the last 24 hours?
consent.s3Desc: Describe the service you will receive.
consent.s4Desc: Review your information before generating the consent contract.
consent.emailNote: You will receive the contract via email for electronic signature.
consent.successMsg: The contract has been sent to your email for final signature.
consent.successSub: Check your inbox and sign electronically to confirm.
consent.substanceWarn: Substance use in the last 24 hours may affect the procedure. The artist reserves the right to reschedule the session.
consent.errorMsg: There was a problem generating the contract. Please try again.
consent.printDocTitle: INFORMED CONSENT AND RELEASE AGREEMENT FOR TATTOO
consent.releaseText:
I certify that I am at least 18 years of age (or have the consent of my legal guardian) and that all information provided is true and complete. I have been informed of the permanent nature of tattooing and its inherent risks. I hereby release MR. Studio Tattoo, its owners, artists, and employees from any liability except in cases of proven negligence. I agree to follow all aftercare instructions.
I authorize the use of photographs or videos of my tattoo for promotional purposes (optional).

booking.desc: Reserve your space in the chronology of art. Direct management, no waiting, with surgical precision.
booking.simpleInfo: Your information will be processed with priority to coordinate your next collector's piece.

errors.name: Minimum 3 characters
errors.selectSlot: Please select a date and time
errors.submitError: There was an error sending your request

success.title: Booking confirmed
success.desc: We have reserved your slot for {{date}} at {{time}}.

multiStep.s1Desc: Select the type of service you wish to book.
multiStep.s3Desc: Select a day and we'll show you real availability for
multiStep.s4Desc: Review details and confirm with security deposit.
multiStep.depositMsg: A deposit of {{amount}} is required to secure your appointment. This amount will be deducted from the total cost.
multiStep.depositPolicy: Cancellation policy: full refund up to 48h before.
multiStep.redirectMsg: You will be redirected to our secure payment gateway.
multiStep.noSlots: No slots available for this day.
multiStep.customTattooDesc: Custom design created in direct collaboration. Your vision, our technical mastery.
multiStep.flashDesc: Pre-designed artwork from the artist's catalog. Immediate execution, fixed price.
multiStep.piercingDesc: Professional piercing with implant-grade titanium jewelry. Clinical precision.

contact.title: Your Contact
contact.desc: Secure your session with your personal details.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.smsOptIn: I agree to receive SMS notifications about my appointment.

serviceType.title: What brings
serviceType.desc: Select the purpose of your visit.

style.title: Choose a
style.desc: What style are you looking for? You can select multiple.

story.title: Tell Your
story.desc: Got a reference or idea? Tell us so your artist can prepare the design.
story.dragDrop: Drag your image here or select a file
story.ideaPlaceholder: Describe your vision: the design, style, meaning, inspiration references...

bodyZone.title: Select a
bodyZone.desc: Choose the body area where you want your tattoo.
bodyZone.instruction: Tap any body part to select
bodyZone.tapToAdd: Tap the silhouette to add a zone

dimensions.title: Project
dimensions.desc: Scale of your project. This helps us estimate session time.

schedule.title: Choose Date
schedule.desc: When do we start? Consultations can be booked up to 14 days from today.
schedule.consultNote: Your first visit is a personalized design session. We'll review your request together, create your concept, and prepare everything before applying ink.
schedule.noSlots: No slots available for this day.

confirmation.title: Booking
confirmation.desc: Your artist will receive the full project brief and will reach out to you.
confirmation.artistBrief: Your artist will receive all this information to pre-evaluate your project and prepare a custom design.
confirmation.icsDesc: Tattoo session at Mr. Studio Tattoo
